title: EKCD: An EKC-derived Ontology for Korean Cultural Heritage Knowledge Modeling
description: EKCD is an EKC-derived ontology for Korean cultural heritage knowledge modeling. Version 1.0.8 is a non-breaking maintenance release that clarifies ontology metadata, adds an explicit authoring policy for Turtle serialization, and aligns the ontology source relation with the canonical EKC ontology IRI.

creators.name: SEO, Dong Shin
creators.affiliation: The Center for Digital Humanities at the Academy of Korean Studies

contributors.name: PARK, Su-jeong
contributors.affiliation: Division of Information Development at the Academy of Korean Studies

notes: This release preserves the v1.0.7 class, object property, and EKCD-local datatype property sets. It adds ontology-level authoring policy metadata and explicit annotation property declarations. EKCD imports and derives from the EKC ontology line. The EKC Vocabulary Contributor Group is acknowledged for its contribution to the source/imported EKC vocabulary; this acknowledgement does not imply that all members of the group directly contributed to EKCD. Among members of the EKC Vocabulary Contributor Group, direct EKCD work has been carried out by Dong Shin SEO and Su-jeong PARK.
